title: ExtractionSchema
description: Schema for structured data extraction from a Nepal Land Ownership Registration Certificate (Laal Purja)

certificate_no.description: The Land Ownership Certificate number printed on the top-right of the document. Extract the full number exactly as printed, preserving digits, slashes, or hyphens. Return an empty string if absent.

office_vdc.description: The V.D.C. or Municipality name of the Land Revenue Office that issued the certificate, as printed in the header (e.g. 'Lagankhel').

office_district.description: The district of the Land Revenue Office that issued the certificate, as printed in the header (e.g. 'Lalitpur').

owner_name.description: Full legal name of the landowner exactly as printed. Return an empty string if the field is blank on the document.

owner_district.description: District component of the landowner's address exactly as printed.

owner_vdc.description: M.C./V.D.C. component of the landowner's address exactly as printed.

owner_ward.description: Ward number component of the landowner's address exactly as printed.

husband_name.description: Full name of the landowner's husband exactly as printed. Return an empty string if absent.

father_in_law.description: Full name of the landowner's father-in-law exactly as printed. Return an empty string if absent.

citizenship_no.description: Citizenship certificate number of the landowner exactly as printed, preserving all digits, slashes, and hyphens.

issue_date.description: The issued date of the certificate exactly as printed, including era suffix (e.g. '2007/02/16 A.D.').

issue_office.description: Full name of the office that issued the certificate, exactly as printed (e.g. 'District Administration Office: Gorkha').

doc_id.description: The small document identifier printed at the bottom-left of the certificate (e.g. '103mm002'). Return an empty string if absent.

print_date.description: The print date shown in the footer line (e.g. '2013/06/10'). Exclude any era suffix like 'A.D.'.

plots.description: List of land plot records from the certificate table. Each plot occupies two rows in the table.

plot_no.description: Prior Plot Number — the leftmost cell in the Evd. Symbol section, spanning two rows (e.g. '1433').

evd_no.description: Evidence symbol number printed in the top sub-row of the 'Description of transaction' column (e.g. '3933').

evd_date.description: Evidence symbol date printed in the top sub-row of the 'Description of transaction' column (e.g. '2013/06/10').

transaction_type.description: Type of transaction printed in the bottom sub-row, spanning the two 'Description of transaction' columns (e.g. 'Resignation').

vdc.description: District/V.D.C./M.C. of the plot, spanning both sub-rows (e.g. 'Sanagaun').

ward_top.description: Ward number or map sheet number shown in the top sub-row (e.g. '8').

ward_bottom.description: Ward number or map sheet number shown in the bottom sub-row (e.g. '8 ka').

plot_section.description: Plot No./Section No. spanning both sub-rows (e.g. '1447').

desc_top.description: Description of the land shown in the top sub-row (e.g. 'Residential land').

desc_bottom.description: Description of the land shown in the bottom sub-row (e.g. 'Private land').

owner_share.description: Land owner share on title, spanning both sub-rows (e.g. 'Sole ownership').

tenant.description: Tenant's name, spanning both sub-rows (e.g. 'Landowner herself').

kind_top.description: Kind of land or class, spanning both sub-rows (e.g. 'First class dry agricultural land').

area_local.description: Area in local units (Ropani-Aana-Paisa-Daam) shown in the top sub-row (e.g. '0-2-2-2').

area_sqm.description: Area in square metres shown in the bottom sub-row (e.g. '83.47').

register_page.description: Register page number shown in the top sub-row (e.g. '2069').

register_serial.description: Register serial number shown in the bottom sub-row (e.g. '3933').

remark.description: Remark text spanning both sub-rows. Return an empty string if blank.

signature.description: Signature of the certifier spanning both sub-rows (e.g. '(Signed)').
